title: Sweep remaining spec files for ULA/GUA references and update for new addressing model
description: Update all other .md files in spec/ (README, 10-implementation.md, 12-apps.md, appendices, drafts, etc.) to remove or revise ULA, fd00, GUA references. Ensure consistency with new link-local + 02xx model. Add any new test vectors or update references to addressing. File findings if cross-references broken.
